questions.question: Какой operator auto-emits OpenLineage events?

options.text: SQL operators (PostgresOperator, SQLExecuteQueryOperator, BigQueryOperator) — parse SQL для source/target tables. S3 operators emit bucket/key as datasets. Spark operators через OL Spark agent. dbt operators native OL support. PythonOperator — manual через extractor или inlets/outlets

questions.explanation: OL provider (apache-airflow-providers-openlineage) auto-emits для standard operators. SQL operators — parsing через sqlparse, extracts source/target tables. S3 operators — bucket/key as Dataset. Spark operators — устанавливается openlineage-spark в Spark job, OL agent emits события напрямую к Marquez (bypasses Airflow). dbt — native integration. PythonOperator / @task — НЕТ auto-emission, нужен custom extractor или declarative inlets/outlets.

questions.question: PythonOperator делает SQL queries через PostgresHook. Как получить lineage?

options.text: Best: переписать на SQLExecuteQueryOperator (still доступно в 2.x) — auto-emission. Alternative: @task(inlets=[Table('source')], outlets=[Table('target')]) — declarative lineage. Last resort: write custom extractor (полный controll, но больше работы)

questions.explanation: Priority list: (1) Replace на SQLExecuteQueryOperator — zero code change, automatic lineage. Best ROI. (2) inlets/outlets declarative — `@task(inlets=[Table('warehouse', 'staging', 'orders')], outlets=[...])` — 5-10 min per task, OL provider reads и emits. (3) Custom extractor — class implementing BaseExtractor, registered via entry_points. ~1 day per unique operator type. Manual emit через OpenLineageAdapter возможен но messy. Production: 95% coverage через approaches 1+2.

questions.question: DAG имеет один 'do_everything' task который reads 5 sources, writes 3 targets. Что плохо для lineage?

options.text: Single task → один OL event с 5 inputs + 3 outputs в одном blob. Marquez показывает один node со множеством arrows — hard визуально trace data flow. Fix: split на multiple tasks per transformation — каждый emits separate clean event

questions.explanation: Lineage clarity — function of DAG structure. Один 'do_everything' = opaque blob в Marquez. Split на logical transformations: stage_orders(orders → staging_orders), stage_customers, build_dim_orders(staging_orders + staging_customers → dim_orders). Каждый task — separate OL event с focused inputs/outputs. Result: clean visual graph в Marquez, useful для impact analysis ('what depends on dim_orders?'), root cause analysis ('orders broken — where?'). Investment in DAG decomposition pays off в lineage usability.

questions.question: Datasets (Airflow 2.4+) сами по себе создают lineage events — outlets=[Dataset(...)] enough для OL emission.
questions.explanation: Dataset references в outlets — OL provider emits dataset events автоматически. Plus dataset-driven scheduling shows как lineage links в Marquez (producer DAG → consumer DAG). В 3.x Datasets → Assets (rename via AIP-74), concept identical. Datasets/Assets — declarative lineage из коробки, без extractors. Best practice: use Datasets для inter-DAG data dependencies — auto-scheduling + auto-lineage в одном.
